final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3×3 grid poster for 小红书, designed for clean slicing into 9 standalone posts.

Style/medium: needs a "clean, premium, feminine wellness lifestyle" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Kinfolk magazine editorial minimalism, 2010s Instagram wellness flat-lay photography, soft Scandinavian interior design; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a standard 3×3 grid layout (3 columns × 3 rows) with clear boundaries between each cell, each cell centered and complete, no text near cut lines, each cell functions as an independent 小红书 card while maintaining visual unity
Subject: must include all 9 grid cells with specific content:
  Cell 1 (cover): large title "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", subtitle "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", visual elements include soft bed, moon, pillow, sleep mask
  Cell 2: title "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", body "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", elements include phone, moon, sleepy face illustration
  Cell 3: title "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", body "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", elements include bedside lamp, warm yellow light, curtains
  Cell 4: title "3. 房间温度别太高", body "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", elements include AC, thermometer, quilt
  Cell 5: title "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", body "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", elements include coffee cup, tea cup, prohibition symbol
  Cell 6: title "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", body "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", elements include bathroom steam, towel, hot water
  Cell 7: title "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", body "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", elements include notebook, pen, small desk lamp
  Cell 8: title "7. 固定上床时间", body "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", elements include clock, moon, bed
  Cell 9: title "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", body "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", footer "收藏这组，今晚试试看", elements include breathing lines, closed-eye figure, stars
Scene/backdrop: must be clean cream-white, light beige, pale oatmeal, soft caramel tones as dominant palette
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, healing, sleep-therapy atmosphere — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: must be cream white, light beige, pale oatmeal, soft caramel dominant, with small amounts of dark brown for text
Materials/textures: needs a light skeuomorphic illustration style with soft textures — exact material treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text as specified in each cell content above, all text must be clear and readable Chinese characters
Constraints: must be 3:4 vertical format suitable for 小红书, must have clear grid boundaries for clean slicing into 9 separate images, all 9 cells must maintain visual unity, no text near grid cut lines, each cell must function as standalone post, high-quality editorial magazine aesthetic, no cheap marketing feel, no excessive ornamentation
Avoid: cheap marketing aesthetic, excessive decoration, cluttered layouts, unreadable text, text too close to grid boundaries, English text
